children.heading: Establishment of Public Safety Trust Fund
children.label: a Establishment of Public Safety Trust Fund

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a trust fund to be known as the Public Safety Trust Fund.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: 2 Availability
children.text: Amounts deposited in the Public Safety Trust Fund shall remain available through fiscal year 2022. Any amounts remaining in the Fund after the end of such fiscal year shall be deposited in the general fund of the Treasury, where such amounts shall be dedicated for the sole purpose of deficit reduction.

children.heading: Repayment of amount borrowed for First Responder Network Authority
children.label: 1 Repayment of amount borrowed for First Responder Network Authority
children.text: An amount not to exceed $2,000,000,000 shall be available to the NTIA to reimburse the general fund of the Treasury for any amounts borrowed under .section 1427 of this title

children.heading: State and Local Implementation Fund
children.label: 2 State and Local Implementation Fund
children.text: $135,000,000 shall be deposited in the State and Local Implementation Fund established by .section 1441 of this title

children.heading: Buildout by First Responder Network Authority
children.label: 3 Buildout by First Responder Network Authority
children.text: $7,000,000,000, reduced by the amount borrowed under , shall be deposited in the Network Construction Fund established by .section 1427 of this titlesection 1426 of this title

children.heading: Public safety research
children.label: 4 Public safety research
children.text: $100,000,000 shall be available to the Director of NIST to carry out .section 1443 of this title

children.heading: Deficit reduction
children.label: 5 Deficit reduction
children.text: $20,400,000,000 shall be deposited in the general fund of the Treasury, where such amount shall be dedicated for the sole purpose of deficit reduction.

children.heading: 9–1–1, E9–1–1, and Next Generation 9–1–1 implementation grants
children.label: 6 9–1–1, E9–1–1, and Next Generation 9–1–1 implementation grants
children.text: $115,000,000 shall be available to the Assistant Secretary and the Administrator of the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration to carry out the grant program under .section 942 of this title

children.heading: Additional public safety research
children.label: 7 Additional public safety research
children.text: $200,000,000 shall be available to the Director of NIST to carry out .section 1443 of this title

children.heading: Additional deficit reduction
children.label: 8 Additional deficit reduction
children.text: Any remaining amounts deposited in the Public Safety Trust Fund shall be deposited in the general fund of the Treasury, where such amounts shall be dedicated for the sole purpose of deficit reduction.

children.heading: Investment
children.label: c Investment
children.text: Amounts in the Public Safety Trust Fund shall be invested in accordance with , and any interest on, and proceeds from, any such investment shall be credited to, and become a part of, the Fund.section 9702 of title 31
